title: Pack of 6 White Christmas Glitter Berry Picks Sprays 30inch Long Artificial Berry Stems Willow Berries Twigs for Christmas Tree Decoration Floral Arrangement Vase Filler Winter Holiday Decor
features: 🎄 PACKAGE CONTENT - Come with 6 pieces of glitter christmas berries Stems , which are available in rich bright color. These artificial glitter spray berry picks will bring a rich and lush winter atmosphere to your Christmas.

🎄QUALITY MATERIAL - The glitter berrie pick is made of quality foam and plastic material, the bright glitter spray make it more attractive and charming, please note that there may be flash powder scattered, but it will not affect the use.

🎄IDEAL SIZE - The total length is 80cm/31.5inch. The length of the stem is 25 cm/10inch, and the length of branch is 55 cm/21.65inch, ideal size for your different decorative works, you can use the christmas berry picks to create various decorative works according to your preference.

🎄EXQUISITE DESIGN - These Christmas glittery branches are designed with simple and elegant shape, exquisite and beautiful, and made with glittering surface. These vivid berry cuttings can be used as christmas tree topper, fillers for vases in your living room, garlands or ornaments on doors to add a festive atmosphere.

🎄XMAS HOLIDAY DECORATIONS - These Christmas Berry Twigs are suitable for christmas tree top decoration, xmas tree filler, christmas garland wreath, table centerpieces, holiday floral arrangement,giftting props, vase filler, winter wedding floral decorations and more. Add some atmosphere to the upcoming Christmas day.
